notes: Ratios as decimals (0.2735 = 27.35%). Amounts in EUR (converted from EUR millions in PDF). Extracted from Pillar 3 al 31.12.2025 (Italian language PDF, 362 pages). KM2 template at p.14, TLAC1 at p.15-16, TLAC3b at p.17. CBR treatment INCLUDED (inferred via breach-test: capacity 27.35% < req 25.44% + CBR 3.52% = 28.96%; rows 28-31 blank in TLAC1 consistent with INCLUDED convention). CBR = 3.522% from KM1 row 11 (CCB 2.50% + CCyB 0.055% + O-SII 0.250% + SRB 0.717%). TLAC3b ranking: col 1=Capitale, col 2=Subordinate, col 4=SNP, col 5=Non garantite, col 6=Depositi non garantiti. Maturity buckets derived from TLAC3b rows 6-10 (col c0050 per bucket). Note: BPER is not a G-SII; TLAC columns b and c not published.
